zh.Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Coker於大約1490年出生在英國多瑟特馬普德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Coker36歲，母親Jane Sutton40歲。他和Elizabeth Beaumont至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1572年在他的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Coker于大约1490年出生在英国多瑟特馬普德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Coker36岁，母亲Jane Sutton40岁。他和Elizabeth Beaumont至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1572年在他的家乡享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from a group of villages in Somerset named with Coker, from a Celtic river name meaning ‘crooked’.

variants.name: Cocker
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Middle English coker ‘fighter, wrangler’.
English: occupational name, ‘one who puts up hay in cocks’, a seasonal occupation.
Probably an Americanized form of German   Kocher  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Coker was born about 1490, in Mappowder, Dorset, England, his father, Sir Thomas Coker, was 36 and his mother, Jane Sutton, was 40. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Elizabeth Beaumont. He died in 1572, in his hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Coker est né environ 1490, à Mappowder, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Coker, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jane Sutton, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Elizabeth Beaumont. Il est décédé en 1572, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Coker um 1490 in Mappowder, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Coker 36 und seine Mutter Jane Sutton 40. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Beaumont mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1572 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Coker è nato il circa 1490 nel Mappowder, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Coker, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Jane Sutton, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Elizabeth Beaumont. Morì nel 1572, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.Mappowder, Dorset, England: イギリスドールセトマップオウダー
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Cokerが約1490年にイギリスドールセトマップオウダーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Cokerは36歳，母Jane Suttonは40歳であった。彼はElizabeth Beaumontとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1572年に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Coker(이)가 대략 1490년 영국 도르세트 마포우더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Coker(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Sutton(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Beaumont(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Coker nasceu aproximadamente 1490, em Mappowder, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Coker, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jane Sutton, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Elizabeth Beaumont. Ele faleceu em 1572, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Coker родился около 1490 г. в местности маппоудир, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Coker было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Sutton, 40. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Elizabeth Beaumont. Он умер в 1572 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Coker nació aproximadamente 1490, en Mappowder, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Coker, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jane Sutton, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Elizabeth Beaumont. Murió en 1572, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años.
